title: Wire CouponEditView into Coupons collection config
body: The EditView component was created at src/ui/admin/Coupons/EditView/index.tsx but not yet registered in the collection's admin.components.views.edit config in src/server/payload/collections/Coupons.ts. It should be wired up to enable the custom edit view.
rationale: The custom EditView is defined but not active - the detail view still uses DefaultEditView

title: Verify UsageProgressField renders correctly in sidebar
body: The usageProgress UI field uses useFormFields() to read usesCount/maxUses from the form. This may not work in a sidebar UI field context where form fields may not be accessible. Test in the admin UI.
rationale: UI fields positioned in sidebar may have different form context than main form fields
